description_long: This is a compact, single-propeller military-style airplane with a camouflage paint scheme featuring green, brown, and blue tones. The fuselage is robust and rounded, with a forward-mounted enclosed cockpit that has a multi-pane canopy. The wings are straight and low-mounted, each bearing roundels, and the tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels and a tail wheel, visible beneath the wings and tail. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the engine cowling is prominent, suggesting a piston engine configuration. The overall design is reminiscent of World War II-era fighter aircraft, with a sturdy build and functional military markings.
description: A compact, camouflage-painted military airplane with a single nose propeller, low-mounted straight wings, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from an upper side angle, highlighting the camouflage pattern, the rounded fuselage, and the propeller at the nose.
description_view_1: A direct top-down view shows the full wingspan, the roundels on each wing, and the symmetry of the tail and cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: This side angle reveals the cockpit canopy, the engine cowling, and the fixed landing gear beneath the wing and tail.
description_view_3: A frontal view emphasizes the propeller, the engine cowling, and the forward placement of the cockpit, with the landing gear visible below.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a single tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a multi-pane canopy.
